center.name: 大汉山国家公园
center.summary: 大汉山国家公园是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Malayan crested fireback，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Malayan crested fireback or Malay crested fireback (Lophura rufa) is a species of forest pheasant found in lowland forests of the Thai-Malay Peninsula and Sumatra

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Malayan crested fireback or Malay crested fireback (Lophura rufa) is a species of forest pheasant found in lowland forests of the Thai-Malay Peninsula and Sumatra
